description: Legal document dated 1819 CE (Shevat 5579) in which Yosef Yuʿbaṣ makes a declaration about 400 gurush that had been invested with him. The day of the month is written as ב׳׳ז=9 but may have been intended as כ׳׳ז=29. The scribal hand displays a heightened level of cursivity compared to other documents from early nineteenth-century Cairo. The scribe has not signed as a witness.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
